Marietta Proper - Marietta, GA
Parties & Groups - Got a birthday party, rehearsal dinner, corporate or other event coming up? We're a great option for your gathering! Inquire today about how we can make your private event perfect!
Book your party
Parties & Groups - Got a birthday party, rehearsal dinner, corporate or other event coming up? We're a great option for your gathering! Inquire today about how we can make your private event perfect!
Reservations
Welcome to Marietta Proper!
We're thrilled to have you to join us for an evening of exquisite wines and delectable small plates.
We highly recommend reservations for our dinner service.
However, reservations are not required, and our bar is available on a first come, first serve basis.
Brunch service is first come, first serve, with no necessary reservations.
Reservations
Enter Our Stylish Wine Bar And Cafe
At Marietta Proper, we take pride in providing an  alluring  experience, reminiscent of a bygone era of the 1920s.
Join us for a cozy brunch and gourmet coffee, or be immersed into  the nightlife of Marietta Square through carefully curated wine and small plate pairings.
Step through our doors and into the Great Gatsby era of fine cuisine, intricate decor, and personable service.
Read more
about us
Expertly Crafted Experiences
Curated To Fit Your Every Need
With flexible private party spaces, exceptional cuisine, and a wide variety of beverages, your guests are sure to have a memorable and enjoyable experience.
Let our team help you plan an unforgettable celebration, and create memories to last a lifetime.

Review by - Google
five star review by
Teresa H:
What a great new jewel in Marietta! Met here with girlfriend for brunch... Love this place! Ambiance, food, service and drinks were great! Will definitely be back with the Hubbie!
Review by - Google
five star review by
Holly P:
This place is wonderful! The food is great and the service is lovely. We've been a few times and every time has been a pleasant experience. Ther servers and attentive and knowledgeable. Each had great recommendations. We love the cocktails
Review by - Google
five star review by
Olga S:
Great experience! Went for brunch with a girlfriend of mine. The food was fresh and tasty. Great espresso martini. Cute decor and our server was super sweet.
